ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alleles" (
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allele */,
  "allele_name" TEXT /* Name of the allele (e.g., HLA-A*02:01) */,
  "allele_description" TEXT /* Description of the allele */,
  "allele_class" TEXT /* Class of the allele (e.g., MHC class I, MHC class II) */,
  "allele_species" TEXT /* Species from which the allele is derived */,
  "allele_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the scientific literature or database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allele_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide (e.g., TIVSRSSRGV) */,
  "peptide_length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide sequence */,
  "peptide_source" TEXT /* Source of the peptide (e.g., synthetic, natural) */,
  "peptide_purity" TEXT /* Purity of the peptide (e.g., 95%) */,
  "peptide_solubility" TEXT /* Solubility of the peptide (e.g., in water, DMSO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being measured */,
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* ID of the allele being measured */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement (e.g., IC50, affinity) */,
  "measurement_inequality" TEXT /* Inequality symbol for the measurement (e.g., =, <, >) */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., nM, kD) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_operator" TEXT /* Operator who performed the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  "measurement_source" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement source */,
  "measurement_method" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement method */,
  "original_allele_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original allele */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_method FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_method") REFERENCES measurement_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_allele_id FOREIGN KEY ("allele_id") REFERENCES alleles ("allele_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_source FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_source") REFERENCES measurement_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_original_allele_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_allele_id") REFERENCES original_alleles ("original_allele_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., cellular MHC/competitive/fluorescence) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the scientific literature or database */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source documentation or data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., competitive fluorescence, radioactivity) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the scientific literature or database */,
  "method_url" TEXT /* URL to the method documentation or data */,
  "method_sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the method (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_alleles" (
  "original_allele_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each original allele */,
  "original_allele_name" TEXT /* Name of the original allele (e.g., HLA-A*02:01) */,
  "original_allele_description" TEXT /* Description of the original allele */,
  "original_allele_class" TEXT /* Class of the original allele (e.g., MHC class I, MHC class II) */,
  "original_allele_species" TEXT /* Species from which the original allele is derived */,
  "original_allele_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the scientific literature or database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("original_allele_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions or access levels for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
